calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Off Calendar

Final Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: (405/CHARLOTTE WOOLARD) CLERK: FRANCES YOKOTA NO REPORTER AVAILABLE

Counsel Eric Grove present for Plaintiff; counsel Robert Zaletel and Lindbergh Porter present for Defendants. Parties presented to the bench the settlement agreement reached between the parties, for the Judge's signature. Court granted the parties' request to submit this now signed settlement document for filing sometime after 2-1-12, per agreement of the parties.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, And Application For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs, Class Representatives Enhancements And Claims Administrator Fees;
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Continued To Feb-14-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Ex-Parte Hearing To Extend Prove-Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Sep-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Charlotte Woolard, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (504)

APPEARANCES:
Eric Grover of Keller Grover LLP representing the plaintiff.
Robert Zaletel of Littler Mendelson, PC representing the defendants.

This matter comes on calendar for a joint ex-parte request to continue the final approval hearing date. The court grants and signs the order. The final approval hearing in this matter is rescheduled from 9/13/11 to January 6, 2011 at 9am in Dept. 405.

MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS FRANKLIN STRICKLAND, FRANK MITCHELL, LUCAS ROCHES, CHAUNCEY ETCHISON AND TODD PAGANO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT.

APPEARANCES: Eric A. Grover, Esq. of Keller Grover LLP 543-1305 for pltfs & moving parties; Robert L. Zaletel, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C. 288-6343 for defts Timec Company, Inc., Welltech National Training Systems, Inc., & Transfield Services, Ltd.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Joint order granting preliminary approval signed in open court. Court sets the final approval hearing for 05/04/11 at 9:30am. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
